Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Tim, what symptoms do you see because of this?  Is there already a ticket open in Jira with a relevant stack trace and/or failure in a test that is using the Changelog?

-1 because the build failed, not because I insist the above information is available.  I'm just trying to see if we can link to and then close an existing ticket when this patch is landed.

Patch Set 1:

I didn't open a separate Jira (maybe I should have...). The original patch introduced a change to changelog_rec_snamelen() function which uses strlen to retrieve length of source name of rename changelog. That change is not working as expected as it requires changelog_rec_sname() to end with "/0" which appears not the case in current code. We saw this cause RENAME changelog corruptions on real filesystems.

I might be able to write a sanity test for this, but I need to look into it more.

I'll add all of this context to the commit message when I refresh.

Patch Set 1:

The ticket is LU-15798

Patch Set 1:

Same issue being fixed in https://review.whamcloud.com/53624

commit.subject: LU-15420 uapi: fix rename changelog corruption
commit.message:
LU-15420 uapi: fix rename changelog corruption

Fix lustre rename changelog corruption. changelog_rec_snamelen()
is being calculated incorrectly. Partially revert the commit
that changed this calculation.

Fixes: 6331eadb ("LU-15420 uapi: avoid gcc-11 -Werror=stringop-overread")
Signed-off-by: Huaqing Wang <huaqing@amazon.com>
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I749c82f4dc7689e5012a3c41c7a8f34673858f54
